thesis_hint: Recent quality on the strongest active branch is stable-to-improving (VVV funding snapback QScore 0.3182 -> 0.5323 -> 0.5323), so exploration is allowed. Target BABY 1h because funding remains extremely negative (~-0.00531) with high open interest and expanding volume; build a liquidation-squeeze reclaim long that only arms after a flush low, a reclaim above a fast trend anchor, and confirmation that funding stays deeply negative at entry. Avoid passive dip-buying and reject any concept that remains exposed during continuation downtrends.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with >= 20 trades and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 1.08, or trending regime profit_factor < 0.95.
